title: STAT+: Can you spot a deepfake X-ray? Neither can your radiologist
summary: Deepfake images can mislead viewers, upend elections, and instigate violence. They can also, researchers say, disrupt medical care.
summary_ko: 딥페이크 이미지는 의료 분야에서 문제를 일으킬 수 있다. 연구자들은 의료 이미지를 조작하여 의사결정을 방해할 수 있다고 경고한다.

title: Wall Street's Trillion-Dollar Bet On "Tax Alpha"
summary:
Wall Street's Trillion-Dollar Bet On "Tax Alpha"

            Tax alpha — the practice of improving investment returns by reducing taxes — has become one of the fastest-growing strategies on Wall Street, according to Bloomberg. 

Rather than focusing only on beating the market, many investment firms now design portfolios to minimize taxes, often producing higher after-tax returns even if pre-tax performance is similar to traditional strategies.

After years of rising markets, many wealthy Americ
summary_ko: 월 스트리트의 1조 달러 베팅, '세금 알파' 전략이 빠르게 성장하고 있다. 이는 투자 수익을 높이기 위해 세금을 줄이는 전략이다.

title: Apogee strengthens case for longer-lasting eczema drug
summary: Company shares climbed by more than 20% on Phase 2 study results suggesting the therapy could provide sustained relief when administered once every three or six months.
summary_ko: Apogee의 임상 시험 결과는 피부염 치료제의 효과가 3~6개월 동안 지속될 수 있음을 보여주었다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S.- and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: AI를 활용한 신약 개발 업체 Earendil Labs가 7억 8,700만 달러의 자금을 확보했습니다. 이 자금은 미국과 중국에 기반을 둔 이 회사의 약 20개 신약 개발과 Sanofi와의 두 가지 유익한 파트너십을 지원할 것입니다.

title: Dry Van Spot Rates Highest Since 2022 As Spring Tightens Capacity
summary:
Dry Van Spot Rates Highest Since 2022 As Spring Tightens Capacity

            Submitted by FreightWaves,

The freight market momentum is building at a rapid clip. 

National dry van spot rates — tracked via the SONAR National Truckload Index, the 7-day moving average of booked rates including fuel — have broken out to a new cycle high of $2.89 per mile.



This represents the strongest level since 2022 and confirms the market’s shift toward carriers is gaining real traction.



Even more tellin
summary_ko: 스프링 시즌에 용량이 조여지며 드라이 밴 스팟 레이트가 2022년 이후最高치를 기록했습니다.

title: STAT+: Buzzy AI doctor startup raises funds, will meet FDA
summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: AI doctor startup raises fresh capital, and what Medicare chief Chris Klomp said at STAT Summit.
summary_ko: AI 의사 스타트업이 자금을 모금하고 FDA와 만나기로 했다. 이는 의료 분야에서 AI 기술의 중요성이 증가하고 있음을 보여준다.

title: How former Acorda CEO Ron Cohen landed at a Parkinson’s cell therapy startup
summary: Cohen says he looked at around two dozen companies since Acorda wound down. Oryon Cell Therapies, with its funding, data and “autologous” approach, stood out amongst the crowd.
summary_ko: 전 Acorda CEO Ron Cohen이 파킨슨병 세포 치료 스타트업에 합류했다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: 노바티스는 유방암 치료를 위한 신약 개발 업체를 20억 달러에 인수했습니다. 이 인수는 노바티스에게 PIK3CA 돌연변이에 의한 종양 성장을 목표로 하는 약물 개발 기회를 제공할 것입니다.

title: Shionogi pays Apnimed $100M for joint venture to awaken sleep disorder dream
summary: Shionogi has struck a deal to take full control of its sleep disorder joint venture, agreeing to pay Apnimed $100 million upfront for its partner’s half of the business.
summary_ko: 시오노기 제약은 수면 장애 치료를 위한 합작 투자에 1억 달러를 투자했습니다. 이 투자는 시오노기 제약이 수면 장애 치료 시장에서 경쟁력을 높이기 위한 전략적 투자입니다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead가 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 자가면역질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 개발에 투자하고 있다. 이는 새로운 약물 개발에 대한 소식이다.

title: Biotech investors set to meet with key congressional panel
summary: A group of biotech investors will meet with members of a congressional commission that's been charged with keeping the US competitive in biotech and protecting national security, amid the rise of China's own life sciences ...
summary_ko: 바이오텍 투자자들은 미국의 바이오텍 경쟁력을 유지하고 국가 안보를 보호하기 위한 의회 위원회와 회의를 가질 예정이다. 이는 중국의 바이오텍 산업이 부상하는 가운데 이루어지는 것이다.

title: Russia Halts Ammonium Nitrate Exports As Global Fertilizer Crisis Set To Worsen
summary:
Russia Halts Ammonium Nitrate Exports As Global Fertilizer Crisis Set To Worsen

            The fertilizer crisis appears to be worsening just as the Northern Hemisphere planting season, in some areas, is about to begin, with top ammonium nitrate supplier Russia announcing on Tuesday via state media that exports of the critical crop nutrient will be halted. 

Russia's state-run news agency TASS said Russia will suspend ammonium nitrate exports from March 21 through April 21. The report cited a
summary_ko: 러시아는 암모니아 질산 수출을 중단하여 세계적인 비료 위기가 심화할 것으로 보인다. 이는 농업과 에너지 산업에 대한 관심이 증가하고 있음을 나타낸다.

title: STAT+: Gilead to acquire immunology biotech, offers lifeline to Galapagos
summary: In today's Readout newsletter: Gilead to acquire an immunology biotech and Merck partners with Flagship company on IBD targets. Plus: Do you have what it takes to be CBER director?
summary_ko: Gilead가 면역학 바이오테크를 인수하고 Galapagos에 생명선을 제공할 예정입니다.

title: Medtronic, Biotronik heart hardware make strides in conduction system pacing
summary: Medtronic and Biotronik both took steps forward this week with their pacemaker hardware designed to target newly emerging geography in the heart, for delivering electric signals that more closely align with the body’s natural beats.
summary_ko: 메드트로닉과 비오토론یک은 심장 전도 시스템을 위한 새로운 기술을 개발했다.

title: Triangle Health raises $4M as people turn to AI to understand their health
summary:
Triangle Health raised $4 million to help people understand their health conditions and explore treatment options, Endpoints News learned exclusively.

 After a person uploads their health records, Triangle’s AI can brainstorm and compare treatments, prepare ...
summary_ko: Triangle Health는 400만 달러의 투자를 유치했다. 이 회사는 인공지능을 이용하여 건강 상태를 이해하고 치료 옵션을 탐색하는 플랫폼을 제공한다.

title: Nvidia CEO: "I Think We've Achieved AGI"
summary:
Nvidia CEO: "I Think We've Achieved AGI"

            Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang joined podcaster Lex Fridman for a 2-plus-hour conversation on the future of AI infrastructure, covering everything from chips, racks, and cooling systems to Nvidia's broader strategy for the next computing era.

Jensen spoke about how computers are evolving from retrieval machines into generative AI factories. The discussion also turned to one of the biggest questions in the AI cycle: whether AGI has already arrived.
summary_ko: 엔비디아의 CEO가 AGI(인공 일반 지능)를 달성했다고 말했다.

title: Mark Zuckerberg Is Building An AI Version Of A CEO To Help Him Run Meta
summary:
Mark Zuckerberg Is Building An AI Version Of A CEO To Help Him Run Meta

            This isn't going to help the speculation that Zuckerberg, himself is a robot. I mean, it's only a joke...right?

Mark Zuckerberg is pushing a future where everyone—inside and outside Meta Platforms—has a personal AI agent. He’s beginning with his own, according to a new report from the Wall Street Journal.

The CEO is building an internal “CEO agent,” still in development, that helps him quickly access informati
summary_ko: 마크 저커버그가 메타를 운영하는 데 도움을 주기 위한 AI 버전의 CEO를 개발 중이다.

title: NASA Head Adds Lunar Base, Nuclear-Powered Mars Rocket To Space Road Map
summary:
NASA Head Adds Lunar Base, Nuclear-Powered Mars Rocket To Space Road Map

            NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman is moving ahead with the agency's ambitious push to return astronauts to the moon, unveiling new plans for a lunar base alongside a nuclear-propelled spacecraft intended to pave the way for a future Mars mission.

At an earlier event, The New York Times reported that Isaacman laid out the agency's three-phase plan: first, expand robotic missions and surface systems; second, bui
summary_ko: NASA는 달 기지와 핵추진 마스 로켓을 우주 로드맵에 추가했다. 이는 우주 탐사 기술의 발전과 새로운 우주 산업의 성장 가능성을 나타낸다.

title: GE HealthCare claims photon-counting CT clearance from FDA
summary: The new Photonova Spectra aims to capture up to 50 times more data than some of its premium CT predecessors.
summary_ko: GE 헬스케어는 새로운 광자 카운팅 CT 기기인 Photonova Spectra가 FDA의 승인을 받았다고 발표했다. 이 기기는 기존의 고급 CT 기기보다 최대 50배 더 많은 데이터를 캡처할 수 있다.

title: RA Capital targets China with latest SPAC deal
summary: The prominent investor aims to merge its latest special purpose acquisition company with a Chinese biotech, according to a securities filing.
summary_ko: RA Capital이 중국의 바이오텍 기업과 합병을 목표로 하는 새로운 SPAC 거래를 발표했습니다. 이는 바이오텍 산업에서 중국의 중요성이 증가하고 있음을 보여줍니다.

title: Immutrin raises $87M to advance drug for progressive heart disease
summary: The fresh funding will help the biotech startup advance a candidate to treat a genetic disorder, “ATTR-CM,” that has become a battleground for companies like Pfizer, Alnylam and BridgeBio.
summary_ko: Immutrin이 8700만 달러를 투자받아 진행성 심장 질환 치료를 위한 새로운 약물 개발에 집중할 예정입니다. 이는 바이오텍 산업에서 새로운 투자가 진행되고 있음을 보여줍니다.

title: Bitcoin's Quantum Risk May Be Real, But the Network Is Preparing: Report
summary:
Bitcoin's Quantum Risk May Be Real, But the Network Is Preparing: Report

            Authored by Micah Zimmerman via BitcoinMagazine.com,

Galaxy Digital’s latest report says the risk that quantum computing could compromise Bitcoin is real, but so is the work underway to protect the network.



The firm’s research frames the issue as a long-term engineering and governance challenge rather than an imminent crisis, with developers already building tools that could reshape how the network secures
summary_ko: 비트코인의 양자 위험은 실제로 존재할 수 있지만, 네트워크는 준비 중이다.

title: STAT+: FTC strikes proposed deal with CVS over charges its PBM manipulated insulin prices, impeded access
summary: The FTC said the settlement will save Americans up to $7 billion in out-of-pocket costs over 10 years.
summary_ko: 미국 연방 거래 위원회(FTC)가 CVS와의 합의를 발표했다는 기사입니다. CVS는 인슐린 가격을 조작하고 접근을 방해한 것으로 알려졌으며, 이 합의는 미국인들이 10년간 70억 달러를 절약할 수 있을 것으로 예상됩니다.
